name: LibrePhotos
compose:
name: slashnode-librephotos
services:
  proxy:
    image: reallibrephotos/librephotos-proxy:2026w14
    container_name: librephotos-proxy
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      - backend
      - frontend
    volumes:
      - proxy_data-photos:/data
      - proxy_data-protected_media:/protected_media
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8150:80
  db:
    image: pgautoupgrade/pgautoupgrade:17-alpine3.22
    container_name: librephotos-db
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: librephotos
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: librephotos
      POSTGRES_DB: librephotos
    volumes:
      - db_data-db:/var/lib/postgresql/data
  frontend:
    image: reallibrephotos/librephotos-frontend:2026w14
    container_name: librephotos-frontend
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
  backend:
    image: reallibrephotos/librephotos:2026w14
    container_name: librephotos-backend
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_healthy
    environment:
      SECRET_KEY: ${secret.APP_SEED}
      BACKEND_HOST: backend
      ADMIN_EMAIL: admin@admin.com
      ADMIN_USERNAME: admin
      ADMIN_PASSWORD: ${secret.APP_PASSWORD}
      DB_BACKEND: postgresql
      DB_NAME: librephotos
      DB_USER: librephotos
      DB_PASS: librephotos
      DB_HOST: librephotos-db
      DB_PORT: '5432'
      MAPBOX_API_KEY: ''
      WEB_CONCURRENCY: '2'
      HEAVYWEIGHT_PROCESS: '1'
      FIXPERMISSIONS: 'true'
      SKIP_PATTERNS: ''
      ALLOW_UPLOAD: 'true'
      CSRF_TRUSTED_ORIGINS: ''
      DEBUG: '0'
    volumes:
      - backend_data-photos:/data
      - backend_data-protected_media:/protected_media
      - backend_data-logs:/logs
      - backend_data-cache:/root/.cache
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  proxy_data-photos:
    name: slashnode-librephotos_proxy_data-photos
  proxy_data-protected_media:
    name: slashnode-librephotos_proxy_data-protected_media
  db_data-db:
    name: slashnode-librephotos_db_data-db
  backend_data-photos:
    name: slashnode-librephotos_backend_data-photos
  backend_data-protected_media:
    name: slashnode-librephotos_backend_data-protected_media
  backend_data-logs:
    name: slashnode-librephotos_backend_data-logs
  backend_data-cache:
    name: slashnode-librephotos_backend_data-cache
